dict.string:
on kitty(cmd) set katpath to "/private/tmp" tell application "System Events" to set katname to name of first file of folder katpath whose name begins with "mykitty" set katsock to katpath & "/" & katname do shell script "/opt/homebrew/bin/kitty @ --to unix:" & katsock & " " & cmd end kitty
on alfred_script(q) tell application "kitty" to activate -- do shell script "/opt/homebrew/bin/kitty @ --to unix:" & katsock & " new-window --new-tab" kitty(q) -- tell application "System Events" to keystroke q tell application "System Events" to key code 36 -- enter key end alfred_script
